Microsoft

I worked for Microsoft for two years, providing technical support across multiple enterprise product lines.

Microsoft Edge

Enterprise browser deployment & support for large-scale environments

  • ▸Group Policy configuration & policy management
  • ▸Browser compatibility & performance troubleshooting
  • ▸Enterprise deployment & security guidance
ChromiumWebView2Group PolicyPowerShellAzure AD
SCCM / WSUS

Endpoint configuration manager & Windows Server Update Services

  • ▸Software distribution & application deployment
  • ▸WSUS sync & client compliance troubleshooting
  • ▸L2/L3 premier technical support for enterprises
SCCM/MECMWSUSWindows ServerSQL ServerIntune

Datawhale

Growing with the open-source community

2022

First Encounter

Joined the open-source learning community, beginning my journey with Datawhale.

2023 - 2025

Ongoing Contribution

Served as a teaching assistant and operations coordinator, promoting open-source culture as a community ambassador.

2026

Official Member

Became an official community member, authoring technical tutorials and contributing to the open-source ecosystem.

I like all kinds of music. Although I don't have much musical talent, I've tried different things in music. I pursue the poetry and uncertainty in music.

Obsessed with piano after watching The Legend of 1900 as a teen. Still chasing the skill to play it smoothly.
Warm oriental guqin still life. Adds tranquil artistic texture to my personal site's bright dark UI.
A warm-toned vinyl record player. Conveying my love for the timeless analog sound.

Projects

All projects →
01 Side Project

Enterprise Q&A Agent

A private enterprise knowledge assistant built with LangChain, LangGraph, Milvus, and DeepSeek, focused on document cleaning, chunking, retrieval optimization, and multi-turn task orchestration.

  • RAG
  • LangGraph
  • Milvus
02 Creative System

Music Generation Agent

An end-to-end music-generation agent that connects instruction understanding, task decomposition, model invocation, and audio fusion across multiple music models.

  • Music AI
  • Agent
  • Audio
03 Engineering Study

ANTLR-based Language Interpreter

A DSL interpreter project covering grammar design, lexer/parser files, AST structures, and separation between syntax analysis and backend logic.

  • ANTLR
  • DSL
  • AST

Personal philosophy

Story is the interface

Tools become memorable when they carry a story: why they exist, what tension they resolve, and what kind of future they point toward. This site is the place where I connect engineering practice with creative memory.

Works

Technical Support

Cross-border payment technology company

Support merchant API and AI Skill integrations while maintaining observability for overseas financial channels.

ITBP / Finance Systems

Automotive enterprise

Managed finance information-system delivery, operations, data governance, and automation opportunities for business teams.

DevOps / SCCM Technical Support

Enterprise software service provider

Handled global endpoint support, Microsoft ecosystem troubleshooting, and enterprise endpoint deployment operations.
